title: 6KX AU Gas Fireplace | Heat & Glo
description: 6KX AU: traditional-aesthetic gas fireplace engineered for Australia and New Zealand markets. Compliance: AS/NZS 5263. Available through AGA-certified dealers.

hero.h1: Traditional warmth. Engineered for the AU/NZ market.
hero.lede: The 6KX AU brings the familiar Heat & Glo traditional hearth aesthetic into compliance with Australian and New Zealand gas standards. AS/NZS 5263 listed. Sold and installed through Heat & Glo's regional AGA-certified dealer network.
